title: Jacobikerk — Le Guess Who?
excerpt: A site-specific light intervention for Le Guess Who? festival in the historic Jacobikerk, Utrecht.
description: A site-specific light intervention for the Le Guess Who? festival, staged in the historic Jacobikerk in Utrecht. Working with the church's gothic architecture, the design wrapped the nave and its chandeliers in slow, shifting light — turning the building itself into an instrument of atmosphere for the festival's program of concerts.
